Main.Title: My Projects
Main.CreateFirstProject: Create your first project to get started!
Main.BindingIssuesTooltip: Click to view controller binding issues

Card.NoActiveProjectHint: Open one of your recent projects from the right, or create a new project to get started.

Form.Description: Configure your project settings, like name, simulator and aircraft.

Error.Required: Please provide a name for your project. It is required.

Simulator.Label: Flight simulator
Simulator.HelpText: Select the primary simulator for this project.
Simulator.UseFsuipc: FSUIPC - alternative legacy interface sometimes used by addons, e.g. PMDG

Aircraft.Label: Aircraft
Aircraft.HelpText: Select the aircraft for this project.

UnsavedChanges.Title: Unsaved changes
UnsavedChanges.Description: You have unsaved changes in your project. What would you like to do?

Controller.not set: No controller used in this config.

Device.not set: No device used in this config.

Table.NoResultsFound: This is a new configuration. Please add some items.
Table.DropHereToAdd: Drop here to add new items.

Precondition.Error: Error evaluating precondition. Check logs for more details.

Source.SIMCONNECT_NOT_AVAILABLE: This config uses SimConnect, connection is missing.
Source.FSUIPC_NOT_AVAILABLE: This config uses FSUIPC, connection is missing.
Source.XPLANE_NOT_AVAILABLE: This config uses X-Plane, connection is missing.
Source.PROSIM_NOT_AVAILABLE: This config uses ProSim, connection is missing.
Source.ReadError: Error occurred during read. Check logs for more details.

Modifier.Error: A modifier is applied which has an error.

Device.NotConnected: The device used in this config is not connected.
Device.Connected: The device used in this config is connected.

Test.Executing: This config is currently being tested.
Test.NotExecuting: This config is not being tested.

ConfigRef.Missing: One or more referenced configs are missing.

NewConfigNotVisible.Message: New config created but not visible.
NewConfigNotVisible.Description: Your config doesn't match the current filter settings so it is not visible in the list.

ControllerAutoBindSuccessful.Title: Great news!
ControllerAutoBindSuccessful.Description: We've updated your project to work with ‘{{controllerName}}’ — everything’s ready to go!

ControllerManualBindRequired.Title: Your input is needed!
ControllerManualBindRequired.Description: {{controllerName}} used in this profile requires manual binding to make your project work correctly.

SimStopped.Title: Flight Simulator Closed
SimStopped.Description: The Flight Simulator has been closed. Execution of config has been stopped. Restart your flight simulator to restart config.

Feed.Title: Community Feed
Feed.Description: News and updates from the MobiFlight community.

ControllerBinding.Title: Controller Bindings
ControllerBinding.Description: Bind the controllers used in this project to the physical controllers connected to your computer.
ControllerBinding.AllSet: All set! Your project is completely configured.

InputConfigWizard.Title: Edit input configuration
InputConfigWizard.Description: Edit all settings for this input configuration in this dialog.

ConfigTrigger.Title: Trigger
ConfigTrigger.Description: The trigger defines the conditions or events that will activate this configuration.

Action.Title: Actions
Action.Description: Define the actions for each event.

ActionType.Title: Action Type
ActionType.Description: Select the type of action you want to perform

onPress.label: On Press
onPress.description: The action will be executed once when the button is pressed.

onRelease.label: On Release
onRelease.description: The action will be executed once when the button is released.

onHold.label: On Hold
onHold.description: This action is triggered when the button is held down for a certain duration and can repeat at the specified interval.

holdDelay.label: Hold delay (ms)
holdDelay.description: The duration in milliseconds that the button must be held down before the action is triggered.

repeatDelay.label: Repeat delay (ms)
repeatDelay.description: The interval in milliseconds at which the action will be re-triggered while the button is held down. Set to 0 to disable repeating.

onLongRelease.label: On Long Release
onLongRelease.description: The action will be executed once when the button is released after being held down for the specified duration.

longReleaseDelay.label: Long release delay (ms)
longReleaseDelay.description: The duration in milliseconds that the button must be held down before a release will trigger this action.

onLeft.label: On Left
onLeft.description: The action will be executed once when the encoder is turned left.

onRight.label: On Right
onRight.description: The action will be executed once when the encoder is turned right.

onLeftFast.label: On Left Fast
onLeftFast.description: The action will be executed once when the encoder is turned left quickly.

onRightFast.label: On Right Fast
onRightFast.description: The action will be executed once when the encoder is turned right quickly.

onChange.label: On Change
onChange.description: The action will be executed once the value of the input changes.

Preconditions.Title: Preconditions (optional)
Preconditions.Description: The preconditions define conditions that must be met before the action can be executed.

ConfigReferences.Title: Config References (optional)
ConfigReferences.Description: The config references define the output configs whose values can be used in the action.

PreconditionEditor.Title: Preconditions
PreconditionEditor.Description: The preconditions define conditions that must be met before the action can be executed.

ConfigReferenceEditor.Title: Config References
ConfigReferenceEditor.Description: The config references define the output configs whose values can be used in the action.

Common.SupportedPlaceholders: Supports input value (@) and placeholders ($, #, etc.)

Xplane.PathPlaceholder: Enter path for DataRef or Command, or select a preset above
Xplane.PathDescription: Hint: Use index notation for access of Arrays, e.g. sim/cockpit2/annunciators/fuel_pressure_low[0] for 1st engine.

ProSim.Title: ProSim Input Action
ProSim.Description: Select a preset to configure your input actions.

LuaMacro.Title: Lua Macro Input Action
LuaMacro.Description: Invoke your Lua macro with an optional parameter. Requires an existing Lua macro in FSUIPC.

Retrigger.Title: Retrigger
Retrigger.Description1: Use this input action to re-trigger all button states.
Retrigger.Description2: This is helpful to sync your virtual cockpit to the switch and button states of your physical controllers.

Variable.ExpressionHelp: Use <1>$</1> to represent the variable value in expressions, e.g. <3>$ * 2</3> to double a number variable.

LogPanel.Title: Log
LogPanel.LoggingDisabled: Logging is disabled. Enable logging in Settings to see logs here.
